description: An applicant has changed their mind and wants to withdraw their pending life insurance application.

nodes.task_description: Identify the applicant and their pending application.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the correct application file.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the applicant's request to withdraw.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent speaks with the applicant and confirms their intent.

nodes.task_description: Close the application file in the system as 'Withdrawn by Applicant'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the application status to closed.
